text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Lotta ta ta... Lovin! Lovin! Lotta ta ta... Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aw man, still can't get it. Something about the rhythm in this part...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Is she... dancing in the park?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. No, no, this isn't for a concert.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This is for my number one hobby, arcade dance games! They're super
fun!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
In races, it's always about whoever runs the fastest, right? But dance
games are a bit different.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Finishing the "race" is important too, but what's just as important is
doing it in style! You gotta look cool and cute, and fa☆bu☆lous!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's the best feeling ever, and the most fun! No other type of game
can compete!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Or at least, that's how I used to feel. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I set a high score the other day, but now a new rival's appeared
and beaten it already.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: My score was 620,000. And their score was 999,999! They actually hit the score ceiling!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wanna get my record back so, so bad—prove that I'm just as good!
So, that's why I'm practicing.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And I've done just about everything I can! Trainer, let's hit up the
arcade together!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Showdown time! I can do this! I absolutely can do this. We can make it happen! All right, let's get this game started!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa, a new personal best! But still so far off... Trainer...
choice_data_list: You can do it! Keep going!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks... You're right. I can't give up after just one try.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to be the invincible Teio! I can be lighter, faster! Try
number two, here we go!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Another huge personal best! But still not enough... Nnngh, how am I
supposed to get any higher?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Uh, hi...?

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text:
She's been watching this whole time. Can't stop gushing about how
good you are.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: R-really? Hey, you having fun watching me dance?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Yeah, lots of fun! But...

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes you look like it really hurts, and then I start to feel like it
hurts too...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Like it hurts? Oh, I never realized I was making that face...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Dance games are meant to be fun. So if I don't look like I'm having
fun, of course I won't get a perfect score.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It does hurt to fail, but that's no excuse not to smile! It'll help me stay calm and loosen up! Isn't that right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Will do! I'll try again. And again, and again! If I can keep a smile on
my lips, I'll be at the top before I know it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right, let's go! Don't forget to cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Teio resumes her endless challenge, now with a crowd rooting
for her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... There goes my smile... But I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: We're in the 900,000's! Almost there!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Teio! Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, you guys... But I might be at my limit... I don't know if I can
move anymore... But even so…

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Teio! Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Their cheers... give my legs strength! C'mon, focus... Last one!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The music stopped...
I... I did it...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I did it! A perfect score! Trainer, you guys, I did it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah... For a sec there I was about ready to call it quits. But then...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You all gave me strength. You made the invincible Teio more than
invincible!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! And it's not just the score that counts—I finished with a smile! I
bet that's why the crowd got so fired up.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Now our scores are tied, but I definitely beat my rival with style points!

text_block_list.name: Arcade Worker
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ah! That machine!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? An employee... Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Arcade Worker
text_block_list.text:
My bad, my bad. I forgot to reset that machine. It was just in
maintenance mode, you see.

text_block_list.name: Arcade Worker
text_block_list.text: The top score was still set to the max. I'll fix it right now.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You whaaat?! Wait, so this isn't actually someone's score? It's just
from maintenance?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! That was a good laugh. Can't believe I got so worked up over
an imaginary rival.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: A bit, but it helped me realize something, I think. See…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Cheers aren't just cheers, they're power. I'm always invincible and incredible, but with that power, I was able to be twice, no, ten times as incredible!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That was just practice! Next time, I'll do it on the track. It'll be the
most exciting win ever, and it'll be thanks to the crowd's cheers!
